title: Analyze Dead Code Elimination (DCE) & Side Effects
description: Analyze the principles of Dead Code Elimination (DCE) and its role in bundle optimization. Identify common reasons why libraries fail to tree-shake effectively due to 'Side Effect' annotations. Optimize library exports and code structure to facilitate efficient DCE by modern bundlers.
objectives: Analyze the principles of Dead Code Elimination (DCE) and its role in bundle optimization.
Identify common reasons why libraries fail to tree-shake effectively due to 'Side Effect' annotations.
Optimize library exports and code structure to facilitate efficient DCE by modern bundlers.
